narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA or at later stages CHINA way out of proportion.. and you are still doing
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western (specifically American) foreign policy and perception, portraying it as hypocritical and alarmist towards Russia and China, which aligns with the narrative of discrediting Western diplomatic stances and actions.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly and no more of month after month of promises from Trump or threats from the east….POOF..it’s all over …thanks mostly to un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries” they are proving the worst of the worst of humanity
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote highlights and seemingly advocates for a catastrophic nuclear war outcome, blaming 'un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries”' for leading humanity to this point, which predicts and emphasizes severe negative consequences stemming from Western governance.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement explicitly questions the reliability and framing of Western media coverage of the Ukraine war, accusing it of prolonging the conflict, which fits the narrative of undermining confidence in media sources.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Will they resort to nuclear weapons to even out the war?
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This question, posed in the promotional text, directly evokes fear and anxiety about the potential for nuclear escalation in the conflict, which is the core of the 'amplifying war-related fears' narrative.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Scott Ritter: Russia is Winning
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The title and premise of the interview explicitly predict a specific outcome of the war—that Russia is winning. This is a direct speculation on the conflict's result.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: amerikans are the greatest pigs on the planet…and that is in the most derogitive term you can imagine.. absolute pigs
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly and harshly criticizes and dehumanizes the people of a Western nation (America), aligning with the narrative of discrediting the West through extreme negative portrayal.
